info.title: Discord HTTP API (Preview)
info.description: Preview of the Discord v10 HTTP API specification. See https://discord.com/developers/docs for more details.

put.description: Modifies the incident actions of the guild

get.description: List join requests for guild, optionally filtered by application status

patch.description: Approve or reject guild join request

post.description: Create an exception to a recurring guild scheduled event

delete.description: Delete an exception to a recurring guild scheduled event

patch.description: Modify an exception to a recurring guild scheduled event

get.description: Get the count of users subscribed to a guild scheduled event
Get a list of users subscribed to a guild scheduled event exception
Get the target users for an invite.

put.description: Update the target users for an existing invite.

get.description: Get the target users job status for an invite.

delete.description: Deletes the specified lobby if it exists. It is safe to call even if the lobby is already deleted.

put.description: Update the external moderation metadata for a lobby message.
Update the external moderation metadata for a user message (DM).

get.description: Returns all subscriptions containing the SKU, filtered by user.
Get a subscription by its ID.

oneOf.title: TYPING_START
oneOf.description: User started typing in a channel

oneOf.title: INVITE_CREATE
oneOf.description: Invite to a channel was created

oneOf.title: INVITE_DELETE
oneOf.description: Invite to a channel was deleted

oneOf.title: WEBHOOKS_UPDATE
oneOf.description: Guild channel webhook was created, updated, or deleted

oneOf.title: CHANNEL_CREATE
oneOf.description: New guild channel created

oneOf.title: VOICE_CHANNEL_STATUS_UPDATE
oneOf.description: Voice channel status was updated

oneOf.title: CHANNEL_UPDATE
oneOf.description: Channel was updated

oneOf.title: CHANNEL_DELETE
oneOf.description: Channel was deleted

oneOf.title: CHANNEL_PINS_UPDATE
oneOf.description: Message was pinned or unpinned

oneOf.title: THREAD_CREATE
oneOf.description: Thread created, also sent when being added to a private thread

oneOf.title: THREAD_UPDATE
oneOf.description: Thread was updated

oneOf.title: THREAD_DELETE
oneOf.description: Thread was deleted

oneOf.title: THREAD_LIST_SYNC
oneOf.description: Sent when gaining access to a channel, contains all active threads in that channel

oneOf.title: THREAD_MEMBER_UPDATE
oneOf.description: Thread member for the current user was updated

oneOf.title: THREAD_MEMBERS_UPDATE
oneOf.description: Some user(s) were added to or removed from a thread

oneOf.title: GUILD_CREATE
oneOf.description: Lazy-load for unavailable guild, guild became available, or user joined a new guild

oneOf.title: GUILD_UPDATE
oneOf.description: Guild was updated

oneOf.title: GUILD_DELETE
oneOf.description: Guild became unavailable, or user left/was removed from a guild

oneOf.title: GUILD_EMOJIS_UPDATE
oneOf.description: Guild emojis were updated

oneOf.title: GUILD_STICKERS_UPDATE
oneOf.description: Guild stickers were updated

oneOf.title: GUILD_INTEGRATIONS_UPDATE
oneOf.description: Guild integration was updated

oneOf.title: GUILD_MEMBER_ADD
oneOf.description: New user joined a guild

oneOf.title: GUILD_MEMBER_UPDATE
oneOf.description: Guild member was updated

oneOf.title: GUILD_MEMBER_REMOVE
oneOf.description: User was removed from a guild

oneOf.title: GUILD_BAN_ADD
oneOf.description: User was banned from a guild

oneOf.title: GUILD_BAN_REMOVE
oneOf.description: User was unbanned from a guild

oneOf.title: GUILD_ROLE_CREATE
oneOf.description: Guild role was created

oneOf.title: GUILD_ROLE_UPDATE
oneOf.description: Guild role was updated

oneOf.title: GUILD_ROLE_DELETE
oneOf.description: Guild role was deleted

oneOf.title: GUILD_MEMBERS_CHUNK
oneOf.description: Response to Request Guild Members

oneOf.title: MESSAGE_CREATE
oneOf.description: Message was created

oneOf.title: MESSAGE_UPDATE
oneOf.description: Message was edited

oneOf.title: MESSAGE_DELETE
oneOf.description: Message was deleted

oneOf.title: MESSAGE_DELETE_BULK
oneOf.description: Multiple messages were deleted at once

oneOf.title: MESSAGE_REACTION_ADD
oneOf.description: User reacted to a message

oneOf.title: MESSAGE_REACTION_REMOVE
oneOf.description: User removed a reaction from a message

oneOf.title: MESSAGE_REACTION_REMOVE_ALL
oneOf.description: All reactions were explicitly removed from a message

oneOf.title: MESSAGE_REACTION_REMOVE_EMOJI
oneOf.description: All reactions for a given emoji were explicitly removed from a message

oneOf.title: USER_UPDATE
oneOf.description: Properties about the user changed

oneOf.title: ENTITLEMENT_CREATE
oneOf.description: Entitlement was created

oneOf.title: ENTITLEMENT_UPDATE
oneOf.description: Entitlement was updated

oneOf.title: ENTITLEMENT_DELETE
oneOf.description: Entitlement was deleted

oneOf.title: READY
oneOf.description: Contains the initial state information

oneOf.title: RESUMED
oneOf.description: Response to Resume

oneOf.title: PRESENCE_UPDATE
oneOf.description: User was updated

oneOf.title: VOICE_STATE_UPDATE
oneOf.description: Someone joined, left, or moved a voice channel

oneOf.title: VOICE_SERVER_UPDATE
oneOf.description: Guild's voice server was updated

oneOf.title: LOBBY_MESSAGE_CREATE
oneOf.description: Sent when a message is created in a lobby

oneOf.title: LOBBY_MESSAGE_UPDATE
oneOf.description: Sent when a message is updated in a lobby

oneOf.title: LOBBY_MESSAGE_DELETE
oneOf.description: Sent when a message is deleted from a lobby

oneOf.title: GAME_DIRECT_MESSAGE_CREATE
oneOf.description: Sent when a direct message is created during an active Social SDK session

oneOf.title: GAME_DIRECT_MESSAGE_DELETE
oneOf.description: Sent when a direct message is deleted during an active Social SDK session

oneOf.title: GAME_DIRECT_MESSAGE_UPDATE
oneOf.description: Sent when a direct message is updated during an active Social SDK session

oneOf.title: INTERACTION_CREATE
oneOf.description: User used an interaction, such as an Application Command

oneOf.title: INTEGRATION_CREATE
oneOf.description: Guild integration was created

oneOf.title: INTEGRATION_UPDATE
oneOf.description: Guild integration was updated

oneOf.title: INTEGRATION_DELETE
oneOf.description: Guild integration was deleted

oneOf.title: APPLICATION_COMMAND_PERMISSIONS_UPDATE
oneOf.description: Application command permission was updated

oneOf.title: APPLICATION_AUTHORIZED
oneOf.description: Sent when an app was authorized by a user to a server or their account

oneOf.title: APPLICATION_DEAUTHORIZED
oneOf.description: Sent when an app was deauthorized by a user

oneOf.title: STAGE_INSTANCE_CREATE
oneOf.description: Stage instance was created

oneOf.title: STAGE_INSTANCE_UPDATE
oneOf.description: Stage instance was updated

oneOf.title: STAGE_INSTANCE_DELETE
oneOf.description: Stage instance was deleted or closed

oneOf.title: GUILD_AUDIT_LOG_ENTRY_CREATE
oneOf.description: A guild audit log entry was created

oneOf.title: GUILD_SCHEDULED_EVENT_CREATE
oneOf.description: Guild scheduled event was created

oneOf.title: GUILD_SCHEDULED_EVENT_UPDATE
oneOf.description: Guild scheduled event was updated

oneOf.title: GUILD_SCHEDULED_EVENT_DELETE
oneOf.description: Guild scheduled event was deleted

oneOf.title: GUILD_SCHEDULED_EVENT_USER_ADD
oneOf.description: User subscribed to a guild scheduled event

oneOf.title: GUILD_SCHEDULED_EVENT_USER_REMOVE
oneOf.description: User unsubscribed from a guild scheduled event

oneOf.title: AUTO_MODERATION_RULE_CREATE
oneOf.description: Auto Moderation rule was created

oneOf.title: AUTO_MODERATION_RULE_UPDATE
oneOf.description: Auto Moderation rule was updated

oneOf.title: AUTO_MODERATION_RULE_DELETE
oneOf.description: Auto Moderation rule was deleted

oneOf.title: AUTO_MODERATION_ACTION_EXECUTION
oneOf.description: Auto Moderation rule was triggered and an action was executed (.e.g. a message was blocked)

oneOf.title: QUEST_USER_ENROLLMENT
oneOf.description: User was added to a Quest (currently unavailable)

oneOf.title: USERS
oneOf.description: Controls role mentions

oneOf.title: ROLES
oneOf.description: Controls user mentions

oneOf.title: EVERYONE
oneOf.description: Controls @everyone and @here mentions

oneOf.title: APP_HANDLER
oneOf.description: The app handles the interaction using an interaction token

oneOf.title: DISCORD_LAUNCH_ACTIVITY
oneOf.description: Discord handles the interaction by launching an Activity and sending a follow-up message without coordinating with the app

oneOf.title: SUB_COMMAND
oneOf.description: A sub-action within a command or group

oneOf.title: SUB_COMMAND_GROUP
oneOf.description: A group of subcommands

oneOf.title: STRING
oneOf.description: A string option

oneOf.title: INTEGER
oneOf.description: An integer option. Any integer between -2^53 and 2^53 is a valid value

oneOf.title: BOOLEAN
oneOf.description: A boolean option

oneOf.title: USER
oneOf.description: A snowflake option that represents a User

oneOf.title: CHANNEL
oneOf.description: A snowflake option that represents a Channel. Includes all channel types and categories

oneOf.title: ROLE
oneOf.description: A snowflake option that represents a Role

oneOf.title: MENTIONABLE
oneOf.description: A snowflake option that represents anything you can mention

oneOf.title: NUMBER
oneOf.description: A number option. Any double between -2^53 and 2^53 is a valid value

oneOf.title: ATTACHMENT
oneOf.description: An attachment option

oneOf.title: ROLE
oneOf.description: This permission is for a role.

oneOf.title: USER
oneOf.description: This permission is for a user.

oneOf.title: CHANNEL
oneOf.description: This permission is for a channel.

oneOf.title: CHAT
oneOf.description: Slash commands; a text-based command that shows up when a user types /

oneOf.title: USER
oneOf.description: A UI-based command that shows up when you right click or tap on a user

oneOf.title: MESSAGE
oneOf.description: A UI-based command that shows up when you right click or tap on a message

oneOf.title: PRIMARY_ENTRY_POINT
oneOf.description: A command that represents the primary way to use an application (e.g. launching an Activity)

oneOf.title: DISABLED
oneOf.description: Webhook events are disabled by developer

oneOf.title: ENABLED
oneOf.description: Webhook events are enabled by developer

oneOf.title: DISABLED_BY_DISCORD
oneOf.description: Webhook events are disabled by Discord, usually due to inactivity

oneOf.title: INHERIT
oneOf.description: inherit guild content filter setting

oneOf.title: ALWAYS
oneOf.description: interactions will always be scanned

event_webhooks_url.description: Event webhooks URL for the app to receive webhook events

oneOf.title: GUILD_INSTALL
oneOf.description: For Guild install.

oneOf.title: USER_INSTALL
oneOf.description: For User install.

oneOf.title: GUILD_SCHEDULED_EVENT_EXCEPTION_CREATE
oneOf.description: Scheduled event exception was created

oneOf.title: GUILD_SCHEDULED_EVENT_EXCEPTION_UPDATE
oneOf.description: Scheduled event exception was updated

oneOf.title: GUILD_SCHEDULED_EVENT_EXCEPTION_DELETE
oneOf.description: Scheduled event exception was deleted

oneOf.title: BLOCK_MESSAGE
oneOf.description: Block a user's message and prevent it from being posted. A custom explanation can be specified and shown to members whenever their message is blocked

oneOf.title: FLAG_TO_CHANNEL
oneOf.description: Send a system message to a channel in order to log the user message that triggered the rule

oneOf.title: USER_COMMUNICATION_DISABLED
oneOf.description: Temporarily disable a user's ability to communicate in the server (timeout)

oneOf.title: QUARANTINE_USER
oneOf.description: Prevent a user from interacting in the server

oneOf.title: MESSAGE_SEND
oneOf.description: A user submitted a message to a channel

oneOf.title: GUILD_MEMBER_JOIN_OR_UPDATE
oneOf.description: A user is attempting to join the server or a member's properties were updated.

oneOf.title: PROFANITY
oneOf.description: Words and phrases that may be considered profanity

oneOf.title: SEXUAL_CONTENT
oneOf.description: Words and phrases that may be considered as sexual content

oneOf.title: SLURS
oneOf.description: Words and phrases that may be considered slurs and hate speech

oneOf.title: KEYWORD
oneOf.description: Check if content contains words from a list of keywords or matches regex

oneOf.title: ML_SPAM
oneOf.description: Check if content represents generic spam

oneOf.title: DEFAULT_KEYWORD_LIST
oneOf.description: Check if content contains words from internal pre-defined wordsets

oneOf.title: MENTION_SPAM
oneOf.description: Check if content contains more unique mentions than allowed

oneOf.title: USER_PROFILE
oneOf.description: Check if user profile fields contains words from a list of keywords or matches regex

communication_disabled_until.description: when the user's timeout will expire and the user will be able to communicate in the guild again, null or a time in the past if the user is not timed out

flags.description: guild member flags represented as a bit set, defaults to 0

joined_at.description: when the user joined the guild

pending.description: whether the user has not yet passed the guild's Membership Screening requirements

premium_since.description: when the user started boosting the guild

n.description: The week to reoccur on (1-5, where 5 represents the last week)
The week to reoccur on (1-5, where 5 represents the last week)

oneOf.title: DM
oneOf.description: A direct message between users

oneOf.title: GROUP_DM
oneOf.description: A direct message between multiple users

oneOf.title: GUILD_TEXT
oneOf.description: A text channel within a server

oneOf.title: GUILD_VOICE
oneOf.description: A voice channel within a server

oneOf.title: GUILD_CATEGORY
oneOf.description: An organizational category that contains up to 50 channels

oneOf.title: GUILD_ANNOUNCEMENT
oneOf.description: A channel that users can follow and crosspost into their own server (formerly news channels)

oneOf.title: ANNOUNCEMENT_THREAD
oneOf.description: A temporary sub-channel within a GUILD_ANNOUNCEMENT channel

oneOf.title: PUBLIC_THREAD
oneOf.description: A temporary sub-channel within a GUILD_TEXT or GUILD_THREADS_ONLY channel type set

oneOf.title: PRIVATE_THREAD
oneOf.description: A temporary sub-channel within a GUILD_TEXT channel that is only viewable by those invited and those with the MANAGE_THREADS permission

oneOf.title: GUILD_STAGE_VOICE
oneOf.description: A voice channel for hosting events with an audience

oneOf.title: GUILD_DIRECTORY
oneOf.description: The channel in a hub containing the listed servers

oneOf.title: GUILD_FORUM
oneOf.description: Channel that can only contain threads

oneOf.title: GUILD_CHANNEL
oneOf.description: guild channel

oneOf.title: PRIVATE_CHANNEL
oneOf.description: private channel

oneOf.title: PARTY
oneOf.description: party

oneOf.title: GUILD
oneOf.description: A guild subscription

oneOf.title: USER
oneOf.description: A user subscription

image.description: Cover image hash of the scheduled event

scheduled_start_time.description: When the scheduled event will start

scheduled_end_time.description: When the scheduled event will end, or null if no end time

entity_type.description: Type of hosting entity associated with the scheduled event

user_count.description: Number of users subscribed to the scheduled event

oneOf.title: DEFAULT
oneOf.description: No default has been set for forum channel

oneOf.title: LIST
oneOf.description: Display posts as a list

oneOf.title: GRID
oneOf.description: Display posts as a collection of tiles

oneOf.title: DISABLED
oneOf.description: media content will not be scanned

oneOf.title: MEMBERS_WITHOUT_ROLES
oneOf.description: media content sent by members without roles will be scanned

oneOf.title: ALL_MEMBERS
oneOf.description: media content sent by all members will be scanned

oneOf.title: ANIMATED_BANNER
oneOf.description: guild has access to set an animated guild banner image

oneOf.title: ANIMATED_ICON
oneOf.description: guild has access to set an animated guild icon

oneOf.title: APPLICATION_COMMAND_PERMISSIONS_V2
oneOf.description: guild is using the old permissions configuration behavior

oneOf.title: AUTO_MODERATION
oneOf.description: guild has set up auto moderation rules

oneOf.title: BANNER
oneOf.description: guild has access to set a guild banner image

oneOf.title: COMMUNITY
oneOf.description: guild can enable welcome screen, Membership Screening, stage channels and discovery, and             receives community updates

oneOf.title: CREATOR_MONETIZABLE_PROVISIONAL
oneOf.description: guild has enabled monetization

oneOf.title: CREATOR_STORE_PAGE
oneOf.description: guild has enabled the role subscription promo page

oneOf.title: DEVELOPER_SUPPORT_SERVER
oneOf.description: guild has been set as a support server on the App Directory

oneOf.title: DISCOVERABLE
oneOf.description: guild is able to be discovered in the directory

oneOf.title: FEATURABLE
oneOf.description: guild is able to be featured in the directory

oneOf.title: INVITES_DISABLED
oneOf.description: guild has paused invites, preventing new users from joining

oneOf.title: INVITE_SPLASH
oneOf.description: guild has access to set an invite splash background

oneOf.title: MEMBER_VERIFICATION_GATE_ENABLED
oneOf.description: guild has enabled Membership Screening

oneOf.title: MORE_STICKERS
oneOf.description: guild has increased custom sticker slots

oneOf.title: NEWS
oneOf.description: guild has access to create announcement channels

oneOf.title: PARTNERED
oneOf.description: guild is partnered

oneOf.title: PREVIEW_ENABLED
oneOf.description: guild can be previewed before joining via Membership Screening or the directory

oneOf.title: RAID_ALERTS_DISABLED
oneOf.description: guild has disabled activity alerts in the configured safety alerts channel

oneOf.title: PRUNE_REQUIRES_ADMIN
oneOf.description: guild has restricted member prune to administrators and the guild owner

oneOf.title: ROLE_ICONS
oneOf.description: guild is able to set role icons

oneOf.title: ROLE_SUBSCRIPTIONS_AVAILABLE_FOR_PURCHASE
oneOf.description: guild has role subscriptions that can be purchased

oneOf.title: ROLE_SUBSCRIPTIONS_ENABLED
oneOf.description: guild has enabled role subscriptions

oneOf.title: TICKETED_EVENTS_ENABLED
oneOf.description: guild has enabled ticketed events

oneOf.title: VANITY_URL
oneOf.description: guild has access to set a vanity URL

oneOf.title: VERIFIED
oneOf.description: guild is verified

oneOf.title: VIP_REGIONS
oneOf.description: guild has access to set 384kbps bitrate in voice (previously VIP voice servers)

oneOf.title: WELCOME_SCREEN_ENABLED
oneOf.description: guild has enabled the welcome screen

oneOf.title: OFFICIAL_GAME_GUILD
oneOf.description: guild is an official guild for one or more games

invites_disabled_until.description: When invites will be enabled again

dms_disabled_until.description: When direct messages will be enabled again
When direct messages get enabled again

oneOf.title: STARTED
oneOf.description: Applicant started but not yet submitted join request

oneOf.title: SUBMITTED
oneOf.description: Applicant submitted join request that is awaiting review

oneOf.title: REJECTED
oneOf.description: Join request rejected

oneOf.title: APPROVED
oneOf.description: Join request approved

rejection_reason.description: Reason request was rejected. Only set when application_status is REJECTED

form_responses.description: Applicant's responses on join request form

oneOf.title: NONE
oneOf.description: Guild has no MFA/2FA requirement for moderation actions

oneOf.title: ELEVATED
oneOf.description: Guild has a 2FA requirement for moderation actions

communication_disabled_until.description: when the user's timeout will expire and the user will be able to communicate in the guild again, null or a time in the past if the user is not timed out

flags.description: guild member flags represented as a bit set, defaults to 0

joined_at.description: when the user joined the guild

pending.description: whether the user has not yet passed the guild's Membership Screening requirements

premium_since.description: when the user started boosting the guild

mute.description: whether the user is muted in voice channels

deaf.description: whether the user is deafened in voice channels

oneOf.title: TERMS
oneOf.description: Field requiring applicant to acknowledge list of terms

oneOf.title: TEXT_INPUT
oneOf.description: Short text input field

oneOf.title: PARAGRAPH
oneOf.description: Long-form text input field

oneOf.title: MULTIPLE_CHOICE
oneOf.description: Field where applicant selects one of many options

oneOf.title: ONBOARDING_DEFAULT
oneOf.description: Only Default Channels considered in constraints

oneOf.title: ONBOARDING_ADVANCED
oneOf.description: Default Channels and Onboarding Prompts considered in constraints

scheduled_start_time.description: Overridden start time of this occurrence

scheduled_end_time.description: Overridden end time of this occurrence

original_scheduled_start_time.description: The original start time of the occurrence to create an exception for

scheduled_start_time.description: Overridden start time of this occurrence

scheduled_end_time.description: Overridden end time of this occurrence

scheduled_start_time.description: Overridden start time of this occurrence

scheduled_end_time.description: Overridden end time of this occurrence

oneOf.description: the scheduled event is only accessible to guild members

oneOf.title: UNINTERESTED
oneOf.description: User is not interested in the event

oneOf.title: INTERESTED
oneOf.description: User is interested in the event

oneOf.title: REMOVE_ROLE
oneOf.description: Remove role

oneOf.title: KICK
oneOf.description: Kick

oneOf.title: INTEGER_LESS_THAN_EQUAL
oneOf.description: the metadata value (integer) is less than or equal to the guild's configured value (integer)

oneOf.title: BOOLEAN_NOT_EQUAL
oneOf.description: the metadata value (integer) is not equal to the guild's configured value (integer; 1)

oneOf.title: ADMIN
oneOf.description: Admins have similar access as owners, except they cannot take destructive actions on the team or team-owned apps.

oneOf.title: DEVELOPER
oneOf.description: Developers can access information about team-owned apps, like the client secret or public key. They can also take limited actions on team-owned apps, like configuring interaction endpoints or resetting the bot token. Members with the Developer role cannot manage the team or its members, or take destructive actions on team-owned apps.

oneOf.title: READ_ONLY
oneOf.description: Read-only members can access information about a team and any team-owned apps. Some examples include getting the IDs of applications and exporting payout records. Members can also invite bots associated with team-owned apps that are marked private.

oneOf.title: INVITED
oneOf.description: User has been invited to the team.

oneOf.title: ACCEPTED
oneOf.description: User has accepted the team invitation.

scopes.rpc.activities.write: for local rpc server access, this allows you to update a user's activity - requires Discord approval
scopes.rpc.notifications.read: for local rpc server access, this allows you to receive notifications pushed out to the user - requires Discord approval
scopes.rpc.screenshare.read: for local rpc server access, this allows you to read a user's screenshare status- requires Discord approval
scopes.rpc.screenshare.write: for local rpc server access, this allows you to update a user's screenshare settings- requires Discord approval
scopes.rpc.video.read: for local rpc server access, this allows you to read a user's video status - requires Discord approval
scopes.rpc.video.write: for local rpc server access, this allows you to update a user's video settings - requires Discord approval
scopes.rpc.voice.read: for local rpc server access, this allows you to read a user's voice settings and listen for voice events - requires Discord approval
scopes.rpc.voice.write: for local rpc server access, this allows you to update a user's voice settings - requires Discord approval
scopes.voice: allows your app to connect to voice on user's behalf and see all the voice members - requires Discord approval
scopes.webhook.incoming: this generates a webhook that is returned in the oauth token response for authorization code grants

scopes.activities.invites.write: allows your app to send activity invites - requires Discord approval (NOT REQUIRED FOR GAMESDK ACTIVITY MANAGER)
scopes.activities.read: allows your app to fetch data from a user's "Now Playing/Recently Played" list - requires Discord approval
scopes.activities.write: allows your app to update a user's activity - requires Discord approval (NOT REQUIRED FOR GAMESDK ACTIVITY MANAGER)
scopes.applications.builds.read: allows your app to read build data for a user's applications
scopes.applications.builds.upload: allows your app to upload/update builds for a user's applications - requires Discord approval
scopes.applications.commands: allows your app to use commands in a guild
scopes.applications.commands.permissions.update: allows your app to update permissions for its commands in a guild a user has permissions to
scopes.applications.entitlements: allows your app to read entitlements for a user's applications
scopes.applications.store.update: allows your app to read and update store data (SKUs, store listings, achievements, etc.) for a user's applications
scopes.bot: for oauth2 bots, this puts the bot in the user's selected guild by default
scopes.connections: allows /users/@me/connections to return linked third-party accounts
scopes.dm_channels.read: allows your app to see information about the user's DMs and group DMs - requires Discord approval
scopes.gdm.join: allows your app to join users to a group dm
scopes.guilds: allows /users/@me/guilds to return basic information about all of a user's guilds
scopes.guilds.join: allows /guilds/{guild.id}/members/{user.id} to be used for joining users to a guild
scopes.guilds.members.read: allows /users/@me/guilds/{guild.id}/member to return a user's member information in a guild
scopes.messages.read: for local rpc server api access, this allows you to read messages from all client channels (otherwise restricted to channels/guilds your app creates)
scopes.openid: for OpenID Connect, this allows your app to receive user id and basic profile information
scopes.relationships.read: allows your app to know a user's friends and implicit relationships - requires Discord approval
scopes.role_connections.write: allows your app to update a user's connection and metadata for the app
scopes.rpc: for local rpc server access, this allows you to control a user's local Discord client - requires Discord approval
scopes.rpc.activities.write: for local rpc server access, this allows you to update a user's activity - requires Discord approval
scopes.rpc.notifications.read: for local rpc server access, this allows you to receive notifications pushed out to the user - requires Discord approval
scopes.rpc.screenshare.read: for local rpc server access, this allows you to read a user's screenshare status- requires Discord approval
scopes.rpc.screenshare.write: for local rpc server access, this allows you to update a user's screenshare settings- requires Discord approval
scopes.rpc.video.read: for local rpc server access, this allows you to read a user's video status - requires Discord approval
scopes.rpc.video.write: for local rpc server access, this allows you to update a user's video settings - requires Discord approval
scopes.rpc.voice.read: for local rpc server access, this allows you to read a user's voice settings and listen for voice events - requires Discord approval
scopes.rpc.voice.write: for local rpc server access, this allows you to update a user's voice settings - requires Discord approval
scopes.voice: allows your app to connect to voice on user's behalf and see all the voice members - requires Discord approval
scopes.webhook.incoming: this generates a webhook that is returned in the oauth token response for authorization code grants
